member.name: T:Conterex.Compliance.Presentation.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Authentication endpoints. The login endpoint here is DEV-ONLY; it consults the stubbed IUserStore (single hardcoded user from configuration). Replace with a real identity module before any deployment outside local dev.

member.name: M:Conterex.Compliance.Presentation.Controllers.AuthController.Login(Conterex.Compliance.Application.Authentication.Login.LoginCommand,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Issues a JWT bearer access token for a valid email/password combination.
member.returns: An access token plus its UTC expiry.

member.name: T:Conterex.Compliance.Presentation.Controllers.WebinarsController
member.summary: Represents the webinars controller. The controller-level [Authorize] attribute protects every endpoint by default; individual actions opt out via [AllowAnonymous].

member.name: M:Conterex.Compliance.Presentation.Controllers.WebinarsController.GetWebinar(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the webinar with the specified identifier, if it exists. Anonymous access is permitted on this read endpoint as a worked example of mixing protected and public endpoints in a single controller.
member.returns: The webinar with the specified identifier, if it exists.

member.name: M:Conterex.Compliance.Presentation.Controllers.WebinarsController.CreateWebinar(Conterex.Compliance.Application.Webinars.Commands.CreateWebinar.CreateWebinarRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new webinar based on the specified request. Requires a valid JWT.
member.returns: The identifier of the newly created webinar.
